hotel_name: ViVi An Bang Hotel (1 Stop ViVi An Bang Beach Hoi An Hotel)

reviews.title: Undeveloped
reviews.text: Poor facilities, especially the breakfast where they just serve 2 eggs, breads, fruits and juice drinks. No other selection. Poor pool conditions where no one swims and the stuff didnt clean or change what they need supposed to change
reviews.room_type: Non-Smoking Precious Comfort Twin Room for 2 People Renovated

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
Not clean enough. Towels are of poor quality. 
There were ants everywhere.

reviews.title: It's "OK" for the money
reviews.text:
Considering the price, it isn't bad.  The location is peaceful and quiet, the people are nice enough, and the cleanliness was livable.  
 The problem is that the 4th floor is like an attic room with a sloped ceiling. To be able to shave, comb your hair, apply makeup, or anything else in the bathroom mirror, you need to kneel on the floor!!! That and you can not come or go without passing through the lobby, where an overfriendly staff will greet you and then try to sell you coffee, food tours, a ride, etc. You start to feel like a teenage child attempting to sneak out of the house.    
 Overall, the place is good for the money, but I will choose somewhere else on my next stay.

reviews.title: I had a great stay overall. The location was perfect and made everything easy to get to, and the staff were friendly and
reviews.positives: The shower was good and that’s important
reviews.negatives: Cleanliness could be improved . there seemed to be a lack of attention to detail, with some surfaces and items not thoroughly cleaned.

reviews.title: Decent stay
reviews.text: The rooms a spacious and well maintained. Simple breakfast bread/egg coffee provided. The shower design is funny with the door moving inwards not giving a lot of space to pass it.

reviews.title: Good value, overall a nice and peaceful stay
reviews.positives: Really good value, nice modern building, spacious room, lovely river view, kind staff. Bikes available for rent. 5-10 min walk to the beach and area with restaurants. Calm and not much noise. Overall a good stay.
reviews.negatives: Bicycle rentals are not included. A bit strict with breakfast - my husband doesn't like noodles for breakfast so he didn't eat breakfast for the whole 7 days. But one day he wanted one egg, they wanted to charge for it - I think it's because they gave me his egg. I felt like they could have accommodated for that instance. Other than that, they were accommodating with our requests and the staff are nice.

reviews.title: We missed our breakfast
reviews.text:
This hotel seems got less bookings. But so far the room looks good. The only problem here is that, seems not cleaned by the housekeepers. Our beddings is soo itchy. I hope they can improve this soon. 

Also for the breakfast, please cooked early. It was already 7am at that time yet there is no food yet, made us checked out early without eating breakfast because we have a scheduled tour on that day.

reviews.title: Quiet place near beach with river view.
reviews.positives:
View from balcony was peaceful. 
Close to beach just one main road to cross. Quiet residential area surrounding it located between beach and river.
reviews.negatives: Pool was covered; may suit some not others. Although it is always better to swim in the sea!

reviews.title: 1 Stop Vivi hotel
reviews.text: The location of the hotel is very good. But the pictures from Agoda are not representative of the room that I stayed in. The body in the reception the day we checked in was not very helpful. We wanted to store food in the refrigerator, but it was not possible because we only got one card. Then the power was turned off every time we removed the card to leave the room. We asked for a second card, but the boy in the reception was not very helpful. We ended up cancel the room, because we could not stay 15 days without refrigerator.
reviews.room_type: Non-Smoking Precious Comfort Twin Room for 2 People Renovated

reviews.title: Among cozy villas in Hoi An
reviews.positives:
Lovely view room and good accommodation.
The staff were very supportive during my late check-in. The service felt cozy and warm, even though it was a last-minute booking.
The rate is one of the best in Hoi An, with a nice view and comfortable room.
Highly recommended!
reviews.negatives: None

reviews.title: Great stay, good value
reviews.text: The hotel offers yummy breakfasts. The staff are friendly & facilities are top-notch. Although the location isn't the most central. The cleanliness of the property is commendable.
reviews.room_type: Non-Smoking Precious Comfort Twin Room for 2 People Renovated

reviews.title: I love it. Relaxing 😌
reviews.positives:
Its near Tan Thanh beach
And the whole area was super quiet, there wasnt many houses or buildings around. 
They have a ceiling fan in the room, I like to have option without having to use AC all the time.
reviews.negatives: Its quite small. Balcony too close to other room

reviews.title: Hotel in the middle of nowhere
reviews.text: Clean hotel with helpful staff. The location may give you easy access to An Bang beach but not much else. There was no store/restaurant in walking distance, it's in a middle of no where and quite dark at night. You need a bike/motorcycle to travel to town for everything. If you agree to sacrifice location for cheap, clean hotel then it's good choice.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Great location, close to the beach, and just a 10 minute ride from the old town. The pool was very nice and clean. Room was big, spacious, as well as the bathroom, and clean. Very nice and helpful staff.
Breakfast was good, deapite only having one option (one day was eggs and bread, the other noodle soup. Always with fruit and coffee or juice).
reviews.negatives: No complaints.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: I was on the 4th floor it had a lovely view over the river. Big room. The kitchenette is for show it only it had a kettle and cups. No choice for breakfast eat what you're giving, quality good. Netflix on the TV if you have an account
reviews.room_type: Non-Smoking Precious Comfort Twin Room for 2 People Renovated

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Todo perfecto ! Amplió , limpio , y muy buena relación calidad precios

reviews.title: Agoda messed up again
reviews.text: Never got to stay here. Agoda makes another mistake booking me into a hotel that wasn't open for business. Took a taxi there only to find it was closed until the next month. Agoda did nothing to help. They just sent the same auto messages over and over that led to nowhere. Requested an agent call or contact me several times but no one ever contacted me.  The auto message said they would pay for a night's lodging but never did. Zero follow thru

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Les toiles d'araignées dans la chambre et la salle de bain, tres peu pour moi...

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Friendly staff, clean, value for money

reviews.title: Pour une nuit ça allait
reviews.positives: Bon emplacement
reviews.negatives: Pas de choix pour le petit-déjeuner

reviews.title: Lovely hotel
reviews.text: We really enjoyed our stay at Vi Vis. The hotel is super clean, no mould anywhere in our room. Its a little out of An bang (by minutes) but we really enjoyed using the free bikes to move around. The staff were very kind.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: La proximite de la plage
reviews.negatives: Une piscine toujours a l ombre ,donc inutilisable

reviews.title: Beautiful room, view and lovely staff
reviews.text: I spent a month here and am considering extending another.  Location is perfect if you want to be near the beach but away from the hustle and bustle.  I feel safe here walking at night and am always greeted with a smile.  My view of the river is incredible and I feel fortunate that I found this as a home away from home during my time in Hoi An.
reviews.room_type: Non-Smoking Precious Comfort Twin Room for 2 People Renovated

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: très belle chambre et hôtel,personnel très gentil ,tranquillité  de l emplacement.possibilite de loyer scooter et vélo sur place
reviews.negatives: on a pris un ticket de bus à l accueil  .l expérience la moins bonne au vietnam,en retard et très vieux bus

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: A fantastic little hotel situated between the river and the sea. All the staff were so friendly and helpful. We hired their bikes and cycled through the coconut palms. Breakfast was bahn mi op la with a choice of juice or coffee. The view from our balcony over the river was so serene. Upon leaving, they organised a driver to da nang which was cheaper than a grab. Thank you so much for a wonderful stay. May your hotel flourish and you, too! 🥰
reviews.room_type: Non-Smoking Precious Comfort Twin Room for 2 People Renovated

reviews.title: Très bon hôtel au calme
reviews.positives:
Hotel très propre, avec une vue magnifique, parfait pour les couches de soleil.
Chambre confortable, lit confortable.
Personnel très accueillant
reviews.negatives: Le Wi-Fi ne fonctionnait pas très bien

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
It's was good for a quiet night.
Staff very kind.

reviews.title: Très agréable
reviews.positives: Le personnel est très gentil et à l’écoute de vos besoins. Très bon petit déjeuner ( bonnes soupes 🍜👌). Chambre agréable et confortable, bien située et jolie vue.
reviews.negatives: Rien à dire de négatif

reviews.title: Great hotel for very cheap
reviews.text:
Good location next to the beach. Neighbourhood is quiet, but it's perfect for a longer stay.
The price is amazing value for money!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Proximite de la plage
reviews.negatives: La piscine toujours a l ombre donc tres froide

reviews.title: resort
reviews.text: It's a hotel like a resort. Very quiet and friendly staff. Good hygiene, close to the beach. River view balcony at an affordable price. Nearby there's good restaurants, etc. It's a very satisfying hotel. The best hotel for a 40-day free travel. It's a great place to relax. My picky wife gave it a 10 out of 10.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: J'ai tout aimé que ce soit l'emplacement, la propreté, le confort et l'accueil tout était parfait

reviews.title: Great New Hotel
reviews.text: This is a new hotel  in a quiet area ‘. Great standard of  rooms and excellent staff that will help you with any problems. 5/8 minute walk to a nice beach. Good price for the standard.
reviews.response:
Dear Grant,
Thank you for your staying here
Hope you stay longer in our hotel
Thank you
Thuy

reviews.title: A recommander
reviews.positives:
Nous avons passé un excellent séjour dans cet hôtel.  il est situé au bord de la mer au calme, il est doté d'une piscine et les chambres sont impeccables. Remerciement tout spécial à Hiep qui nous a aidé à organiser notre séjour et nos excursions. Merci beaucoup
Cet hôtel est situé bord de plage non loin du bruit et de la fureur de Hoi An. Facile à rejoindre en taxi ou en mobylette. Les prix sont raisonnables. Ce fut un excellent moment.

reviews.title: Good location for beach stay
reviews.text:
Nice quiet stay in  ViVi hotel for one week, handy for the beaches and An Bang area, little bit of a journey to the old town.
Staff where OK, and room was cleaned every day, even with out asking.

reviews.title: LE MEILLEUR HÔTEL D’HOI AN BEACH ! Génial on a adoré!
reviews.positives: La gentillesse du personnel, l’ultra confort de la chambre (on a eu un problème avec la réservation et ils nous ont mit dans l’une des meilleures chambres qu’ils avaient sans qu’on le demande), la vue de la chambre, les espaces communs (salle de réception + piscine super sympas) la possibilité de louer des vélos et des scooters (150k) et de faire des lessives. Il y a un super supermarché juste à côté ou l’on a pu faire des ptites courses pour baisser notre budget c’était top ! Et c’est également très proche de la plage + wifi géniale ! En bref c’est un grand OUI pour cet hôtel ! Je recommande !
reviews.negatives:
Petite odeur d’humidité dans la chambre mais c’est souvent présent au Vietnam 
+ p’tit dej aléatoire, on a eu 2/3 jours un p’tit dej 100% vietnamien (nouilles + poulet) et 1 fois un p’tit dej avec des pancakes et du chocolat trop bon 🙃
(Mais p’tit dej inclus donc c’est validé !)

reviews.title: Amazing
reviews.text: Has everything you need
reviews.room_type: Non-Smoking Precious Comfort Twin Room for 2 People Renovated

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Le personnel est très accueillant et disponible. La chambre était propre et confortable.

reviews.title: Great stopover
reviews.text: Everything you need and a longer than usual swimming pool. Room was big and spacious and has a balcony with views over the river. Short walk to the beach.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
Das Hotel hat super schlechtes Internet, der Fernseher ging auch nicht. Die Zimmer benötigen dringend eine Renovierung 
 Das Personal war das mit Abstand schlechteste auf meiner 3 monatigen Reise durch Vietnam. Absolut nicht zu empfehlen

reviews.title: Quiet modern hotel on the river..with an elevator
reviews.text: Very nice, modern building with lovely gardens.  Only less than 1 klm from An Bang beach. Grab less than $2. Great, professional and friendly staff. Room is spacious and well equipped and plenty of hot water. Bed linen high quality. Basic, yummy breakfast of eggs, fruit, bread and coffee. Quiet location overlooking the river. Highly recommend.
reviews.room_type: Non-Smoking Precious Comfort Twin Room for 2 People Renovated

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Der Strand ist fußläufig erreichbar. Die Zimmer sind gut ausgestattet.
reviews.negatives:
Sauberkeit war nicht gut. Wir mussten erstmal 5 Spinnen mit Spinnenweben entfernen. Auf der Bettwäsche waren Flecken. 
Vorsicht beim Flughafenshuttel. Preise stimmen nicht mit booking.com überein. Doppelter Preis wie bei anderen regionalen Anbietern.

reviews.title: It's a satisfactory accommodation!~
reviews.text:
This accommodation is very cost-effective~ 
The price is under 20,000 won, and they upgraded my room and helped with early check-in.
There was no smell in the room, it was comfortable, and the balcony was spacious, which I liked.
However, the amenities were lacking, and during the shower, I had to keep adjusting the water temperature.
And please overlook the dust on the ceiling fan~ :)
Breakfast was simple and served from 8 to 10 AM. 
On the first day, there was rice noodles, coffee, and fruit, 
and on the second day, pancakes, coffee, and fruit.
It felt a bit secluded, but I enjoyed my stay very much♡

reviews.title: Für den Preis ganz in Ordnung , würde ich aber nicht wieder buchen.
reviews.positives: Die Lage war in Ordnung
reviews.negatives:
Die Unterkunft versucht einen Touren anzudrehen die keiner braucht , zumindest wenn man nicht das erste mal in Hoi An ist. Es hätte gründlicher gereinigt werden können .
Personal an der Rezeption versteht nicht ausreichend Englisch.

reviews.title: Perfect t, quiet atay
reviews.text: The staff here is the best you'll ever meet. Rooms are spacious, clean and quiet and comfy. Bicycles could be in better shape. Great stay to remember.
reviews.room_type: Non-Smoking Precious Comfort Twin Room for 2 People Renovated

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: Leider Schimmel an der Klimaanlage gehabt

reviews.title: Quiet and comfortable accommodation.
reviews.text: The surrounding area is quiet, friendly, and has comfortable accommodations. It's a 10-minute bike ride to An Bang Beach, and just across the street, you can reach Hidden Beach, which is connected to An Bang Beach and is a quieter beach further down. Nearby, there are hidden restaurants with a view of the Tubon River, perfect for a stroll. The accommodation's swimming pool can be partially covered or uncovered to choose sunlight, which was nice.
reviews.room_type: Non-Smoking Precious Comfort Twin Room for 2 People Renovated

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Geräumiges, helles Zimmer mit Balkon und großen Glasschiebetüren mit Blick auf den Fluss. Sehr bequeme Betten und nachts war es angenehm ruhig. Wäschservice zu einem annehmbaren Preis. Das Personal hat uns auch ein Moped zum Ausleihen für ca. 6 Euro am Tag besorgt.
reviews.negatives: Das Frühstück war sehr bescheiden, da hatten wir uns mehr erwartet. Waren 3 Nächte hier und an einem Tag gab es nur eine kleine Tasse Kaffee als Getränk dazu, am letzten Tag dann zusätzlich ein Glas Tee.

reviews.title: Nice quiet hotel
reviews.text:
I stayed for two nights, the rooms were clean & toilet is large. The staff were really nice and accommodating . Many 
thanks to Thuy the receptionist!

It’s a little out of reach to walk to places, but it was a good place to end the night, far from honking of traffic :)
reviews.response:
Dear Ummu,
Thank you for your wonderful experience with us. Wishing you good health and success.
See you soon

reviews.title: Tolles, sauberes Zimmer, Strandnah
reviews.positives: Toller Ausblick, schönes, großes Zimmer. Personal sehr freundlich.
reviews.negatives: Wenn man die Klimaanlage nachts an hat, liegt die eine Seite vom Bett im Zug.

reviews.title: Great new hotel.
reviews.text: This isn't on the beach but its a 5/8 min walk.Hotel is new and the staff excellent. Its in a quiet area but restaurants and shops close by. As its new hotel  everything is clean and nice. .I would highly recommend  staying here

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Liegt super zwischen Strand und Altstadt.  Roller wurden uns von der Unterkunft direkt vor die Tür organisiert.  Sehr liebes Personal! Gern wieder!

reviews.title: A hidden gem
reviews.text: Right on the riverside with balconies that get the afternoon and evening sun and a only a ten minute walk to An Bang beach. Absolutely nothing not to like.
reviews.room_type: Non-Smoking Precious Comfort Twin Room for 2 People Renovated

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
Das Hotel ist sauber und gepflegt. 
Die Betten sind angenehm. 
Die Dusche ist heiß,  zu jeder Uhrzeit und hat einen guten Wasserdruck, das Wasser ist frisch und sauber (saubere Leitungen).
Sehr gute, freundliche Atmosphäre im Haus.
Das Hotel eignet sich auch für einen längeren Aufenthalt,  da man unter Tags schön im Schatten am Schwimmingpool oder im Frühstücksraum sitzen kann.
Das Frühstück ist den Preis wert, jeden Tag gibt es etwas anderes :Suppe, Omelett, Pancake , guter Café. 
Ein gut sortierter Laden in der Nachbarschaft hat zu guten Preisen alles was man sonst noch braucht.
Die Gegend ist sehr ruhig,  mit schöner Aussicht auf den Fluss, man ist schnell zu Fuß am Meer.
Genug gute und günstige Restaurants fußläufig zu erreichen.

reviews.title: Great place to stay
reviews.text: I had a lovely room with a balcony and view of the river. The beach was only a 10 min walk and lots of nice cafes and restaurants.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Sauberer Zimmer, nah am Strand und freundliche Personal
reviews.negatives: Frühstück war bisschen enttäuscht, da wenig Auswahl gibt. Aber kann man verstehen, da es nicht in Season und wenig Gäste gibt.

reviews.title: Far away
reviews.text: A bit far too way from everything
reviews.room_type: Non-Smoking Precious Comfort Twin Room for 2 People Renovated

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Super nettes und hilfsbereites Personal. Saubere Zimmer, Strand 2 min laufweg entfernt, ruhige Lage und gutes Frühstück.

reviews.title: Out of the way.
reviews.text: 13 000 dong (4-5 minutes) grab bike ride from all the bars and restaurants in this part of town. Hotel is out of the way, so very quiet area. Perfect for relaxing. Room is surprisingly nice for the price. Spotlessly clean, very nice bathroom and balcony. Staff are friendly and helpful. Highly recommend.
reviews.room_type: Non-Smoking Precious Comfort Twin Room for 2 People Renovated

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Camera super accogliente, pulita e completa di tutto in una zona molto tranquilla. Staff molto gentile.

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.text: We stayed here for 3 nights with a friend who came to meet us from the uk. She has pretty high standards and approved of this accomidation. Rooms were great, spacious and modern. Bit of a walk to the main area but as are most places here. Nice pool and offers things to eat as well.

reviews.title: Tuyệt
reviews.positives: Phòng ốc rộng rãi, sạch sẽ, giá cả hợp lý
reviews.negatives: Chỗ nghỉ sẽ phù hợp với người muốn tránh xa phố thị ồn ào, tìm nơi yên tĩnh. Sẽ không phù hợp với người ưa náo nhiệt đông đúc, gần những tiện ích

reviews.title: Awesome Hotel
reviews.text: Wow Vivi Is an absolute find! Fantastic value for money and great location, all mod cons you need Netflix/ Smart TV etc… I will stay again very very good!

reviews.title: Trung bình ổn.
reviews.positives: Phòng rộng rãi, sạch sẽ, view sông rất thư giản
reviews.negatives: Phòng khá tối, chỉ 2 ánh đèn, 1 ánh đèn vàng ngủ, 2 là đèn trắng chổ phòng khách. Vì vậy makeup thì thiếu ánh sáng rất bất tiện. Nvien buồng phòng k đc thân thiện lắm ^^.

reviews.title: Great stay!
reviews.text: Very good location, in a peaceful part of Hoi An. Nice and clean room, and friendly staff 🙂

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Phòng ốc sạch sẽ, view mát và tiện nghi phòng rất ok lun ấy, mn nên ở đây nha, gần biển và di chuyển ra phố cổ mất 10’ thoaiiiii

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Must have been the most special place, staff, location.  I really felt the staff's sincerity in every additional step they gave to make my stay joyful.

reviews.title: tuyệt vời
reviews.positives: Chỗ nghỉ đẹp lắm, đẹp hơn trên ảnh, cách biển an bàng 1km, cách Hội An  6km đi xe máy, rất yên tĩnh và không khí an lành, rất thích hợp đi du lịch nghỉ dưỡng, đầy đủ tiện nghi.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room has a beautiful view of the river, very quiet and clean.
reviews.room_type: Non-Smoking Precious Comfort Twin Room for 2 People Renovated

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Sạch sẽ, phòng đẹp như hình

reviews.title: Wonderful vacation here
reviews.text: This place is truly worth it with its location near the beach and the clean, comfortable space. The staff is very friendly and always ready to help, creating a home-like feeling. The amenities are sufficient and modern, making the trip more enjoyable. If you are looking for a great place to rest, this is the perfect choice for you.
reviews.room_type: Non-Smoking Precious Comfort Twin Room for 2 People Renovated

reviews.title: Rất tốt
reviews.positives:
Toà nhà gần đường chính, dễ tìm. 
Không gian xung quanh thoáng đãng.
Phòng có ban công (cùng ghế ngồi) và cửa sổ ở hai hướng nên ánh sáng đầy đủ giống như trong hình ảnh minh hoạ. Trong phòng có nhiều tủ chứa đồ.
Mọi thứ đều mới và sạch sẽ.
Hotel có sẵn dịch vụ giặt đồ nên rất tiện. Có bể bơi nhỏ ở phía sau nhưng mình ko sử dụng. Anh chị chủ/lễ tân thoải mái.
reviews.negatives: Quạt thông gió trong nhà vệ sinh hơi ồn. Nhưng có công tắc riêng biệt, nên không phải là vấn đề lớn.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: I recently stayed at 1 stop ViVi in An Bang, and it was an absolutely delightful experience. From the moment I arrived, the staff were warm, professional, and eager to help. The room was spacious, impeccably clean, and well-equipped with everything I needed for a comfortable stay.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Phòng sạch sẽ, anh chủ thân thiện, vui vẻ. Đầy đủ tiện nghi 💗💗

reviews.title: Lovely Hotel. Amazing Staff
reviews.text:
I thought the Hotel was lovely and cosy. The staff are very warm, kind and helpful.

The hotel is located in a quiet area, a short drive or cycle to the beach.

I enjoyed the peace and quiet.

If you need or require anything the hotel staff. Would help you in  any way that they possibly could.

I would definitely recommend 1 stop VIVI .

Grocery store and restaurants within walking distance, if you don't feel like going far.

I very much enjoyed my 14 days,
reviews.room_type: Non-Smoking Precious Comfort Twin Room for 2 People Renovated

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Phòng đẹp , giá cả hợp lý, khá đầy đủ tiện nghi

reviews.title: Great hotel!
reviews.text: Great hotel! The staff were super friendly and always willing to help. The room was clean, airy, and well-equipped. Nice view and relaxing atmosphere — a perfect place to stay. I had a very pleasant experience here.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Nhân viên nhiệt tình khách sạn sạch sẽ 10 điểm chất lượng

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The staff is very enthusiastic, the rooms are clean, all have a river view, quiet and close to the beach, I had a wonderful time here.

reviews.title: Không
reviews.positives: Không gian tiện nghi
reviews.negatives: Khôg

reviews.title: Vivi
reviews.text: Loved my time at this hotel after being in busy Da Nang.. Close enough to cafes, restaurants and beaches. It is very quiet and peaceful and the staff are amazing. Breakfast was nice and I was always greeted with a smile. The rooms are very well maintained and are just like the photos online.
reviews.room_type: Non-Smoking Precious Comfort Twin Room for 2 People Renovated

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Anh nhân viên nhiệt tình cute lắm ạ

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Very good
reviews.room_type: Non-Smoking Precious Comfort Twin Room for 2 People Renovated

reviews.title: Good choice!!
reviews.positives: sạch sẽ, phòng rộng có ban công, gần biển.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: An affordable hotel with good facilities and very nice view

reviews.title: Tuyệt vời, thư giãn
reviews.positives: Phòng ốc rộng rãi, sạch sẽ, có ban công, nhiều tiện ích trong phòng, nhân viên lễ tân dễ thương, có dịp vào Hội An sẽ lại ghé đến
reviews.negatives: Không điều gì

reviews.title: Best!
reviews.text: The hotel is incredible, rooms are new, clean and super comfortable. I slept so good there! The staff is amazing! Even though we don’t eat Vietnamese traditional breakfast with meat, she did her best to prepare a vegetarian option for us! I’m so grateful! If I’m in Hoi An again, I will stay in this hotel. Location is super quiet, has a beautiful view on the river and just 7 minutes walk to the beach. Hoi An busy town is 10 minutes away by motorbike.  I absolutely enjoyed my stay there and definitely recommending it! The best!
reviews.room_type: Non-Smoking Precious Comfort Twin Room for 2 People Renovated

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Приехали первый раз в этот город из Начанга, перед дорогой сильно заболели. Оставить вещи и идти гулять рано утром уже не было сил , наш автобус прибыл раньше положенного времени, но администрация пошла нам навстречу, разместила нас.  Круглосуточная охрана, отличный дизайн комнат, вид с балкона на реку  бесподобный, всегда горячая вода с хорошим напором, понравился местный завтрак, даже в дождливую погоду тут прекрасно. Локация  отеля в полной тишине,это делает отдых настоящим.

reviews.title: Quiet hotel, great staff
reviews.text: Small, clean hotel 5 minutes from the beach. Staff is wonderful and very attentive. I would definitely stay here again.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Obsługa oraz pokój bardzo czysty jedynie lokalizacja trochę za daleko jeśli chodzi o 3 letnie dziecko trochę męczące bo mały zasypiał w trakcie powrotu z hoi an

reviews.title: The staff members are very kind.
reviews.text: I was assigned to a different room due to a toilet malfunction in the reserved room, but they let me use a bicycle for free and also gave me complimentary drinks. The staff were very kind and it was great. Although it's a small village-like town, I was able to ride a bicycle to the beach, and there are many cafes and restaurants nearby, making it a perfect place for a quiet vacation.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Vi havde ventet fra kl 07 om morgen på at få vores værelse og fik at vide lige inden indcheckning kl 12 at vi ikke kunne få vores værelse på grund af en “vandskade” hvilket resulterede i at vi måtte finde et andet sted at bo

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: The room was spacious and neat with a good river view. The staff were friendly and kind. I enjoyed riding a bicycle to the beaches and Hai Hong ancient city.
reviews.room_type: Non-Smoking Precious Comfort Twin Room for 2 People Renovated

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Cheap compared to other hotels in the area.
reviews.negatives: The room has mold and the roof leaks badly during rain. There's a wedding venue operating within 100m of the hotel, with loud music blasting from the speakers for hours. The location isn't the best, it's bit too far from th old town or the beach.

reviews.title: Quiet and relaxing.
reviews.text: The hotel is located by the river, and the view from the window is spacious. The building is new, and the rooms are large. The staff is friendly, and the breakfast was delicious. I visited by bike, but the parking area is underground and secured with a shutter.
reviews.response:
Dear Harunori,
Thank you for your choice our hotel
Have good trip
See you next time

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: The room was cleaned daily, with water bottles and instant coffee supplied as well
reviews.negatives: The personnel pestered me daily to cancel the booking reservation, because they didn't want to pay the extra charge for the website use. There was no hot water in the evening, that couldn't been fixed until morning, which meant 4 days without hot water during the cold, rainy weather.

reviews.title: A warm hotel to stay
reviews.text:
This is really warm hotel to stay
* The facilities is very clean!
* Staff is friendly and supportive. I can see the true love in her job.
* It's near An Bang beach, just a few mins to walk.
I will definitely book it next time to Hoi An.
reviews.response:
Dear sir,
Thank you for your enjoying our hotel
Have good trip

reviews.title: A beautiful hotel but be aware....!
reviews.positives:
One of the best stays for peace & room view 👌🏻.
Fantastic the room has a great ceiling fan so I didn't need to use the Aircon.
reviews.negatives:
1. Room 304 was infested with tiny ants...a problem the hotel knew of, but regardless of the issue, still rented the room out!  I got very little sleep as the ants were crawling over me all night, constantly waking me up!
The hotel offered to use ant killer but I flatly refused to sleep with chemicals in my room!  Besides, the problem will always be there.
They then offered me another room but I had to hang around & wait until 11.30am...wasting my morning. They would not even offer me the use of a bicycle for the afternoon for free (VND50K/day)...so although I had booked 9 nights, because their attitude sucked, I chose to move to another hotel.  

2. The restaurant is not functional & they don't even have a menu, despite what the website claims!

Such a shame, because it was one of the best rooms I've been in, in terms of space, view & ceiling fan....but the experience was ruined by a customer care attitude problem!

reviews.title: Amazing hotel
reviews.text: This is the first time our family visit Hoian. We try to find a hotel with reasonable price but good in service. Vivi was amazingly matched our choice. Very very friendly staff, room is clean and fully equipped. My son love the swimming pool very much. The hotel have 2 building and garden around it. Amazing hotel!
reviews.response:
Dear Mr. Phu
Thank you for your choice our hotel. We are very happy to have your good comment
Hope you and your family had good time in our hotel
Thank you
See you next time

reviews.title: Pleasant stay
reviews.positives: Clean, spacious room, felt new. Good value for money. The receptionist, Hip, was great! We did the cooking course as per recommendation and it was fabulous!
reviews.negatives: The location is a bit random, but it’s a quick walk to the ‘beach’. There is no restaurant or kitchen you can use on site.

reviews.title: Beautiful
reviews.text: This is perfect place for you to stay in Hoi an.
reviews.response:
Dear Purnima.
Thank you for choice our hotel. We are very happy when you have good time with us
See you next time

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Very good price for what you get. Room is clean, cosy and large. Best value I had in vietnam
Very quiet hotel
reviews.negatives: The location, was a bit too quiet and far from everything

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel is so clean, quiet, and the owner and staff are so friendly.
reviews.response:
Dear Jaehyun,
Thank you for your wonderful experience at our hotel.
Wish you will comback in next year
See you soon

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The bed was extremely comfortable, the staff very pleasant, and the location was peaceful,  just what I was after
reviews.negatives: Nothing, it suited my needs fine

reviews.title: Amazing experience throughout
reviews.text: The location, the staff, the room, the value and the vibe were all excellent. A true pleasure, I hope to come back one day.
reviews.response:
Dear Darragh,
Thank you for your wonderful experience at our hotel.

reviews.title: Convenient and easy place a short walk from the beach and a ten minute drive from Hoi An Old Town
reviews.positives: 10 minute walk from beach, lovely service at reception. Elevator to get to higher floors. Comfy beds.

reviews.title: very good hotel near the beach
reviews.text: like a luxury resort. i wished i had booked more nights with this hotel.
reviews.response:
Dear Chị Hien,
Thank you for having a great time at our hotel. Wishing you have good health and peace always.
See you soon
Thuy

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
The room was comfortable, clean and spacious. The best thing was the shower - we enjoyed the glass screen, good water pressure and lovely hot water!
The pool was lovely and clean - we enjoyed a refreshing swim after being at the beach.
reviews.negatives: The breakfast was not great - don't count on it keeping you going until lunch. There were no options for breakfast- only whatever local dish was being served on the particular day (rice cakes / noodle soup etc.) - it could be a problem if you have dietary restrictions e.g. being vegetarian. The portion size was also very small (we're not big eaters, so this is not a relative statement) and only one drink was included (either a small coffee or orange juice).

reviews.title: Stay at Vivi hotel
reviews.text: Friendly staff, nice room and good service
reviews.response:
Dear Ms. Tuyen and family,
Thank you for having a great time at our hotel. Wishing you have good health and peace always.
See you soon
Thuy

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Very nice and friendly staff, clean rooms.
reviews.negatives: Room might be slightly bigger, beds occupied most of the space.

reviews.title: Buena estancia
reviews.text: Buena estancia. Nos encantó su piscina
reviews.room_type: Non-Smoking Precious Comfort Twin Room for 2 People Renovated

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: The room was super spacious and comfortable.
reviews.negatives: It could have been cleaner, particularly the floors in the room.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The best place to connect with yourself, away from the noise of the city. Close to beautiful beaches and an incredible location!

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
Very nice room. Clean and tidy, everything is good (smart TV with full option, string wifi). The pool is very clean. The staff is very friendly and willing to help you when needed.
The neighborhood is quiet and maybe a bit boring if you’re looking for fun-crowded area but for me it’s perfect 
Just around 900m to the beach, 4km to Hoi An old town, same 4km to Cua Dai
There are quite a lot delicious restaurant nearby, a convenient store right next door (100m)
Absolutely love this place

reviews.title: 조용한 마을
reviews.text: 4층 vip룸에서 4일 지냈는데 3일째부터 작은 벌레가 계속 나왔습니다. 한적한 시골같고 자전거타면 비치도 멀지않아서 좋은데 숙소가 깨끗하지는 않네요.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Clean. Everything I needed to hand
reviews.negatives:
Seems to be above the refrigeration, so there was a load humming constantly.
'River view' was disappointing as I couldn't actually see the river for trees

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Reasonable hotel

reviews.title: Excellent stay and would recommend
reviews.positives: Staff and location

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
조용하고 강이 바라보인 호텔 
조용하고 한적하여 여유롭게 힐링하기 좋은곳은거 같아요 
깨끗하고 넓으며 방이 전체적으로 밝아 너무 마음에 들었어요

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Really clean room, quiet area near the river, good bed, good quality room, excellent value for money, not far from beach. Quiet part of town. Really lovely staff. About 10 minutes from Old Town. Had a balcony. Very nice place.
reviews.negatives: Coming at the wettest time of the year, there is a little bit of mould about. They did their best to keep it clean.

reviews.title: בסד
reviews.text: בסדר ולא מעבר 🙏🏼

reviews.title: Value for money for solo traveller
reviews.positives: Very clean, friendly staff, from 3rd floor great view, little fridge for drinks and late night snacks, enough space to spread out your fully packed bag. Close to An Bang beach, which is where all the live music gigs are based. Elevator was a nice touch, as my bags are very heavy. Worth the price.
reviews.negatives: The 1 room on very end of the building's window has a direct view into the neighboring property.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Nhân viên phòng buồng nên kiểm tra kĩ đồ trước khi khách check in

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Clean room and attentive staff.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: 2vc có dịp ở 2₫. Mọi thứ rất tốt, có thêm mini bar nữa là tốt biết mấy

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Nice, clean hotel. Good room with river view.Very friendly personnel. Good value for money.

reviews.title: Nhân viên thân thiện, hỗ trợ tốt. Tiện nghi ổn.
reviews.text:
- Nhân viên rất hỗ trợ khách. Trên app không có lựa chọn nhiều dạng phòng khác nhau cho cùng một mức giá nên đến nơi m muốn đổi phòng 2 giường sang 1 giường thì nhân viên hỗ trợ 3 phòng cùng tầng và upgrade lên family room vì có bé nhỏ đi cùng.
- Phòng buồng sạch sẽ, rộng rãi. Nội thất mới, hiện đại.
- Bể bơi do có mái che nên bơi mùa hè mà hơi lạnh ^^
- Không sát bờ biển nhưng đi bộ cũng chỉ tầm 5-10 phút là tới. Có thể mượn xe đạp ks đi, dắt xuống tận bãi rồi khoá xe vào.
- Nước nóng năng lượng mặt trời toàn bộ nên mỗi lần dùng xả hơi nhiều nước lạnh, hơi lãng phí chút :(
- Xung quanh hơi ít lựa chọn ăn uống. Lúc nhà mình nghỉ thì không phục vụ ăn trưa và tối nên cũng khá bất tiện.
reviews.response:
Khách sạn Vi Vi xin cảm ơn gia đình đã chọn khách sạn chúng tôi làm điểm lưu trú trong thời gian lưu lại Hội An. Chúc gia đình sức khỏe thành công
Xin chào và hẹn gặp lại

reviews.title: loved staying here with a lovely room and great view and lovely staff
reviews.positives: love this hotel and the staff and the views and the total quiet and peace and the decor in the room
reviews.negatives: nothing

reviews.title: Wonderful staff and peaceful location
reviews.positives: Quiet and private location that is a short walk to the beach area, cafes and only a 10 minute taxi to HoiAn town. The staff are wonderful and were so kind, I felt so cared for and extended my stay. Would happily return here again :)
reviews.negatives: It would be nice to have table and chairs on the balcony

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Rất yên tĩnh, gần biển

reviews.title: Peaceful and Comfortable
reviews.positives: The area was great, just outside A Bang so easily walkable (10minutes) So it was nice and quiet right near the river. 5 minute walk to the beach. The room was very spacious and clean. I booked for two weeks and ended up staying a month. The staff were very friendly and helpful. They also make delicious fresh juices, smoothies & coconut coffee 🙏🏻 Thank you for a relaxing stay
reviews.negatives: We had a little trouble arranging bus transportation for the correct bus. I think this may have been down to a language barrier. However - no harm done and I managed to get where I needed to go, I was just a few hours late.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: rất yên tĩnh, view đẹp và dọn dẹp sạch sẽ

reviews.title: I strongly recommend it. It is great place, and it is twice as great for its price.
reviews.positives: The room is planned perfectly - wardrobe near the entrance, table with a space under to keep luggage, spacious balcony, serene surroundings. There is currency exchange, surfing school and art gallery nearby. Also the room can boast full width window, so you do not miss a single sun beam. The staff was pleasant to talk to and helpful.
reviews.negatives: The lights on the balcony are too bright. It would be better with only middle lamp.

reviews.negatives: Pool wasn't the cleanest so didn't use it. Nice small hotel in a nice location

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Tốt

reviews.title: 100% spending a whole month here the next time I come
reviews.positives:
The room was big and bright. The balcony faced the river 100 feet away. The hotel is surrounded by empty lots, and there is a refreshing breeze all afternoon, to the point I didn't have the AC on. 

This is the perfect hotel if you like afternoon naps.
reviews.negatives: You have to pay with cash, so make sure you have VND on you. The currency exchange options close by or not very good.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Đáng giá trải nghiệm. 5 sao

reviews.title: Nicest hotel ever!
reviews.positives: Had only one night at ViVi An, but it was not enough. The staff was so nice and helpful! Laundy service was very quick. And the room was amazing!! Very spacious with a nice big kingsize bed. A big balcony and also the bathroom was so nice and clean. There was even a minifridge and tv with Netflix. And the price was so cheap for the luxury you get while staying here. Even though it was too cold to swim, the swimming pool looks amazing. Had a great night here and would recommend everyone who wants to stay at a more quiet part of Hoi An to stay here!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Отель просто душка. пока свеженький.
Номера чистые и  милые. Ничего лишнего.
Приятный вид был на реку.
Все красиво и зелено.
Завтраки...... Что то сделают))
Отель недалеко от моря.
Можно выбрать тип пляжа. Более уединенный или с людьми.
До города пешком ходил даже. Примерно 4.5 км.
Здесь жить комфортнее чем в городе, на мой взгляд.
В прокате велосипеды и мотобайки.
Кафешек полно на ан банг бич.
Но я ездил в город в основном.
Вечера там необыкновенные.
Персоналу спасибо. 🙏
Рекомендую.
С удовольствием вернусь ещё.
reviews.room_type: Non-Smoking Precious Comfort Twin Room for 2 People Renovated

reviews.title: Very pleasant stay
reviews.positives: Clean, spacious, good comfort

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Понравилось расположение, спокойное место для отдыха, рекомендую

reviews.title: Nice stay
reviews.positives:
Can’t complain about anything for the cheap price that I paid the room!
With a bicycle you can easily go around to the beach and some restaurants. The old town of Ha Noi is only 15min ride and there is a bicycle path as well.
reviews.negatives: Celling should be cleaned as well, as there was a couple of spider webs.

reviews.title: Very good for that price
reviews.text: The rooms are clean and well equiped. Hotel is 10 min walk from the beach in quiet area. Would recommend.

reviews.title: Great place to stay
reviews.positives: Had a great stay at ViVi. The staff are so friendly, the rooms are clean, light and airy. Perfect location close to the beach but away from the rowdier bars and hostels.
reviews.negatives: I booked the studio expecting it to be self-contained, but it's not. Kitchen and laundry are available in the hotel, but the rooms are basic.

reviews.title: More Than Comfortable.
reviews.text:
The property, staff and hotel comforts hit the mark. The rooms are large and have the required amenities. 
No TV channels though. You can stream your media through screen cast app on the display.
The location is well outside of city attractions. Yet close to the beach. That placement should be your priority. Food is a short 10min walk away. The local mini mart is a cluttered mess.

You would only need a day to see the city attractions. See the TEH DAR show. An entertaining hour.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr Miles
Thank you for your choice our hotel
Thank you for your comments. We will change and improve.
Have good trip and see you next time

reviews.title: Amazing
reviews.positives: Staff were very helpful and always there to help! We had a lovely breakfast that the receptionist made for us, rooms are modern and clean (Netflix on the tv) a grab car into town centre costs 50.000 / 80.000 VND. If we were ever in the area I would definitely go back :)
reviews.negatives: Nothing it was perfect

reviews.title: Not good
reviews.text: The overall experience was really bad. No proper breakfast and room with mosquitoes. The location is slight outskirts of beach area so a bit secluded. Overall management and customer care was poor
reviews.response:
Dear Harisingh
Thank you for your choice our hotel and we are very sorry about this probleme you had. You come Hoi An in the rainning season so every where had a lot of mosquitoes. When we open the door they will come inside.
Thank you for your comments. We will change and improve.
Thank you
Have good trip
See you next time

reviews.title: Amazing
reviews.positives: Clean and friendly staff made me feel like family

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Beautiful view.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: My favourite stay in Vietnam so far. Phuc, the receptionist and the entire staff are so kind, warm and welcoming. They made sure all our needs were taken care of. The hotel includes free bicycle rentals that makes transportation easy. It’s about a 5 min walk to the beach. The free breakfast is a great way to start our day. The hotel rooms are so comfy and clean with such a beautiful view. Smart TV and such a cute washroom. There are lots of nearby restaurants and it’s about a 20 min bike ride to the night market. If you’re staying in Hoi An this is the perfect place to stay. Can’t wait to come back !
reviews.negatives: Everything is perfect
